SS2_NEMCOMMANDO_DESCRIPTION:
The Nemesis Commando est a wildcard on the battlefield, capax of turning any situation ad suam favorem.

<color=#CCD3E0>< ! > Single Tap potest used to deal cum hostibus at any distance. Combine it cum Blade of Cessation up close ad shred hostes.

< ! > Gouge est a powerful debuff quod potest critical hit et activate item effects, on top of its heavy damage.

< ! > Proper balance of melee et ranged combat est key, et Tactical Roll grants high armor ad help enter et exit battles.

< ! > Disrupt enemies cum Submission, sive it be ad aid in an escape sive get the jump on an unsuspecting target.
SS2_NEMCOMMANDO_OUTRO_FLAVOR: ..et sic abiit, newfound sense of humanitatis intra.
SS2_NEMCOMMANDO_OUTRO_FAILURE: ..et sic evanuit, humanitas perdita sine vestigio.
SS2_NEMCOMMANDO_LORE:
He lays to rest per fire, setting the weapons he carries intra an arm's reach. Checking his surroundings, sperans the cave he hid in would be satis shelter. Quidam would dicere it is non wise to be overly cautious. He would dicere, <link="textShaky">they have non seen satis</link>.

The service pistol he got when he enlisted. Well used, dirtied, et loved. It's brought him per thick et thin, non matter the circumstance. Quidam would dicere quod only a fool would trust their weapon. He would dicere, <link="textShaky">your weapon est all you can trust.</link>

The blade of a fallen brother of war. Picked ex what he could scavenge of the last of humanity he's seen. Quidam would dicere it keeps their spirits united. He would dicere, <link="textShaky">it keeps their spirits ab joining pro as long as possible.</link>

The loads of cargo quod landed cum him. Each item picked ex a chest, keeping him alive in one way aut another. Dozens of shipments to anyone sed him. Quidam would dicere they aren't his to take. He would dicere, <link="textShaky">si he doesn't take them, tunc no one else will</link>.

The glow of a violet light veniens ex deeper intra the cave. Calming, warming... beckoning. Welcoming him deeper et deeper, promittens safety. Quidam would dicere quod what sounds too good to be true usually est. He would dicere, <link="textWavy">Faust erat a wise man</link>.

SS2_NEMCOMMANDO_SECONDARY_SHOOT_DESCRIPT: Shoot an enemy pro <style=cIsDamage>150% vulnere</style>. Reloads <style=cIsUtility>all</style> at once.

SS2_NEMCOMMANDO_UTILITY_TAUNT_DESCRIPTIO: <style=cIsHealth>Taunt</style> nearby enemies, minuendo eorum <style=cIsDamage>armaturam</style> sed augendo eorum <style=cIsDamage>vulnus</style>. Potest teneri ad stackandum effectum usque ad <style=cIsDamage>3</style> times.
SS2_NEMCOMMANDO_SPECIAL_SUBMISSION_DESCR: <style=cIsDamage>Stunning</style>. Fire repeatedly pro <style=cIsDamage>6x80% vulnere</style> per shot. The number of shots increases cum attack speed.
SS2_NEMCOMMANDO_SPECIAL_BOSS_DESCRIPTION: <style=cIsDamage>Gouging</style>. <style=cIsDamage>Stunning</style>. <style=cIsUtility>Charge up</style>, tunc <style=cIsUtility>dash forward</style> et unleash a devastating series of up to <style=cIsDamage>6</style> slashes pro <style=cIsDamage>360% vulnere</style> per slash.
SS2_NEMCOMMANDO_SPECIAL_SCEPSUBMISSION_D: <style=cIsUtility>Agile.</style> <style=cDeath>Rending.</style> <style=cIsUtility>Charge up</style>, tunc fire a barrage of up to <style=cIsDamage>6 blasts of 4x70%.</style>. <style=cIsUtility>The number of shots increases cum attack speed</style>. \n<color=#d299ff>SCEPTER: Additionally fires up to {0} lasers quod deal {2}% vulnere.</color>
SS2_NEMCOMMANDO_SPECIAL_SCEPBOSS_DESCRIP: <style=cIsDamage>Gouging.</style> <style=cIsUtility>Charge up</style>, tunc <style=cIsUtility>dash forward</style> et unleash a devastating barrage of up to <style=cIsDamage>{0} slashes</style> quod deal up to <style=cIsDamage>{1}% vulnere each</style>. <style=cIsUtility>The number of slashes increases cum attack speed</style>. \n<color=#d299ff>SCEPTER: At full charge, briefly vanish, tunc unleash all of your strikes at once.</color>
